## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] relevant tests executed and summarized

## Docs freshness checklist

- [ ] `README.md` updated when user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/API.md` updated for any endpoint/request/response changes
- [ ] `docs/TESTING.md` updated when test surface or commands changed
- [ ] `docs/EVALUATION.md` / `docs/BENCHMARKS.md` updated when benchmark snapshots changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`
